name: @fairmint/open-captable-protocol-daml-js
description: Open CapTable Protocol DAML smart contracts with generated JavaScript bindings

scripts.codegen: npm run build && cd OpenCapTable-v04 && daml codegen js && cd .. && npm run build:ts && tsx scripts/bundle-dependencies.ts
scripts.upload-dar:mainnet: npm run build && ts-node scripts/upload-dar.ts --network mainnet
scripts.upload-dar:devnet: npm run build && ts-node scripts/upload-dar.ts --network devnet
scripts.upload-dar: npm run upload-dar:devnet && npm run upload-dar:mainnet
scripts.create-ocp-factory:mainnet: npm run codegen && ts-node scripts/create-ocp-factory.ts --network mainnet
scripts.create-ocp-factory:devnet: npm run codegen && ts-node scripts/create-ocp-factory.ts --network devnet
scripts.upload-and-create:mainnet: npm run upload-dar:mainnet && npm run create-ocp-factory:mainnet
scripts.upload-and-create:devnet: npm run upload-dar:devnet && npm run create-ocp-factory:devnet
scripts.upload-and-create: npm run upload-and-create:devnet && npm run upload-and-create:mainnet
scripts.publish: npm run publish:manifest && cd generated/js/OpenCapTable-v04-0.0.1 && npm publish
scripts.publish:manifest: npm run publish:prep && cd generated/js/OpenCapTable-v04-0.0.1 && npm pack --dry-run --json --ignore-scripts > /tmp/npm-pack.json 2>/dev/null && jq -r '.[0].files[].path' /tmp/npm-pack.json | sort | tsx ../../../scripts/collapse-manifest.ts > ../../../generated/npm-manifest.txt
scripts.publish:prep: npm run codegen && npm run update-version && cp generated/ocp-factory-contract-id.json generated/js/OpenCapTable-v04-0.0.1/ && tsx scripts/bundle-dependencies.ts

author: Fairmint
